name: Library of the Wilds
description: A leafy library dedicated to the natural arts of foraging and herbalism.

name: Library of the Deep Earth
description: A stone-walled library filled with mining texts and mineral samples.

name: Library of the Hearth
description: A warm library smelling faintly of bread and spices.

name: Library of Cloth
description: A library draped in fine fabrics and tapestries.

name: Library of the Garden
description: A sun-drenched library with potted plants on every shelf.

name: Library of the Forge - Weapons
description: A library with iron-framed shelves and weapon diagrams on the walls.

name: Library of the Forge - Armor
description: A heavy stone library with suits of armor displayed between bookshelves.

name: Grand Library of Nature
description: A grand hall combining foraging and cooking knowledge.

name: Grand Library of the Smith
description: A sprawling hall dedicated to the complete metalworking craft.

name: Grand Library of the Home
description: A warm and welcoming grand library for the domestic arts.

name: Fighter's Guild Hall
description: A battle-scarred hall lined with weapons, trophies, and training dummies.

name: Thieves' Guild Den
description: A shadowy underground hall, poorly lit and full of wanted posters.

name: Mage's Guild Hall
description: An arcane hall crammed with glowing artifacts and towering bookshelves.

name: Cleric's Guild Hall
description: A solemn hall of white stone, candlelit altars, and holy symbols.

name: Druid's Grove Hall
description: An open-roofed hall of living trees and moss-covered stone.

name: Townsperson's House
description: A modest private home. Shelves with household goods. Someone lives here.

name: Wealthy Citizen's Home
description: A finely appointed home with good furnishings and locked cabinets.
